words.def: a lump or mass of hard consolidated mineral matter
words.zh: n. 岩石, 岩礁；岩石礁石（rock複數形式）

words.def: hosiery consisting of a cloth covering for the foot; worn inside the shoe; reaches to between the ankle and the knee
words.zh: n. 短襪, 鞋墊, 一擊

words.def: outer bark of the cork oak; used for stoppers for bottles etc.
words.zh: n. 軟木塞, 軟木樹, 軟木

words.def: a lump or mass of hard consolidated mineral matter
words.zh: n. 岩石, 岩礁, 石頭, 基石, 暗礁, 搖動, 搖滾樂

words.def: ratio of the adjacent side to the hypotenuse of a right-angled triangle
